transcript.text:
[Tzuyang in New York]
This is one of the three famous steakhouses in New York
[Beautiful night lights in Times Square]
This steakhouse is one of the three famous steakhouses in New York
I'll be going to this place called Wolfgang steakhouse
There are a lot of people here
It indeed is one of the top 3
It's all in English
Just like that?
I want to know how many ounces each of them are
[Answer to our prayers]
The porterhouse is 1kg
Ribeye is 700g
That's a lot of steak
I want the chef's recommendation for the soup
[Today's soup is..]

[Veggie soup!]
Bon appetit
This soup is not for me
Don't touch it
Is it hot? Yes, it will burn you
[All around 3kg]
This is the tenderloin
This is a type of a T-bone steak
Which one is the tenderloin?
Over here
And this is the sirloin
Here's the juice
Everyone's looking at me
Bon appetit
This side is the tenderloin, and this is the sirloin
These are big pieces

Do I cut this one in half?
Or just eat it?
That's so good
How does it taste like this?
The meat is not tough at all It just bites off
The seasoning is a bit salty since we're in America
But it's tender and tasty
Amazing
[How do you like our country's steak?]
I'll try this now It's a different part
This one is a little more tough
But it has a good chewy texture
Very chewy
So good
There's meat juice over here
I think I'm supposed to dip the meat here

Where's my coke?
This one looks like the tomahawk steak
It's so big All the steak here are big
I almost cut it up with a fork
It cuts like butter
Everything in America is big
Seriously, everything is so big
I don't know how to properly cut a steak
This tastes like a short rib
There's meat juice in the middle
I think this is the ribeye cap steak
Yummy
This is a cow
I would like to introduce you to our owner
[The founder of Wolfgang steakhouse]
[A photo with the Wolfgang family]

[Embarrassed]
This is as big as a regular steak
It's very thick
This sauce..
Black pepper?
Like some kind of a spice
The spice is a bit too strong for me
This one is very similar to the previous steak
The inside is almost rare because of its thickness
Very good
[I want a bite]
Which one? Just choose
Take the big one
He says it's very tender
Dip it here
He's the cameraman

He was watching me eat
You can have 1 more
It may look like I'm struggling to chew because I have a mouthful
But it's very soft
These are all like 800g, 1kg steaks
It's just all meat today
Cold noodles, please
I want some cold chewy noodles
[Subscribe~]
This is the lamb chop
It looks good
It's kind of hard to eat because of the bone
It's so tender
I just ate a chunk of salt
That was just salt
Really delicious

So yummy
Lamb chops are hard to eat, but it's really delicious
This is definitely my #1 pick
The steak sauce is amazing too
It's sour And it's sweet
I can't cut the meat off of this anymore
I've been just eating without putting much though into it
Now that I think about it, the last time I went to eat at a family restaurant before I started mukbang
was like once or twice when I was in elementary school
So I never had stuff like smoked beef before I started mukbang
That's right
[Tzuyang ate around 3kg of steak in 1 hour and 30 minutes]
Thanks everyone~
[For the first time ever] [New York Yankees Stadium Mukbang]
[The last episode from New York] Subtitles by Hyun Choi antharoni@gmail.com
